mnemonics: Direct Green IT effects are like a P.E.C. of gold: They are the Primary, Energy-related, and Carbon impacts of computing hardware itself.
keyPoints: Primary energy consumption of devices and data centers.
Associated carbon emissions from that energy use.
E-waste generated from the disposal of IT equipment.
commonMistakes: Confusing direct effects (own operations) with the broader indirect effects (enabled savings).
Overlooking the manufacturing and disposal phases of the hardware lifecycle, focusing only on the use phase.
